accepted.reason: photon-gating-agent.py is a CLI tool whose purpose is to read SPEC files at user-supplied paths (e.g. --specs-dir, --output-dir). The argparse parameters explicitly model the tool's contract: the operator points it at the photon-upstreams clone tree from CI. Adding realpath+commonpath guards is not meaningful because the tool has no fixed base directory; the operator selects it. Workflow-controlled invocation, no external attacker surface. Accepted as intentional CLI design.
